job_posting.jd_text: Synthetic posting for demo use. Responsibilities include stakeholder discovery, process mapping, SQL-backed analysis, dashboard requirements, and implementation handoff. No real employer or candidate data is represented.

fit_summary_3_bullets: Consulting BA responsibilities align with stakeholder and process work.
Travel and hybrid expectations need confirmation.
